description: Assess India BOCW (Building & Other Construction Workers) statutory compliance for a named construction establishment: establishment registration, the 1% welfare cess, the Form XXV annual return (by 15 Feb), Safety Officer / Safety Committee thresholds, and accident notification — grounded in KB-REG-IN-BOCW with MANDATORY state detection. Use it to produce a BOCW compliance gap-list for a site in a given state, resolve which Welfare Board return is filed and when, and flag the OSH-Code (BOCW subsumed) transition. State detection is mandatory; state-specific values resolve from the KB row or are [GAP]-flagged, never invented; no hard-coded national form. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output.
name: bocw-compliance
notes: Markdown-report degradation; run the intake conversationally.
